name: Developer Tool
appropriateWhen: The primary task involves code, configuration, diagnostics, builds, logs, or technical workflows.
inappropriateWhen: The experience is primarily lifestyle discovery or long-form editorial reading.
mobileStrategy: Turn simultaneous panes into an explicit list-detail sequence and keep commands copyable.
signatureMovePatterns: Use repository evidence, command output, diffs, or capability state as the visual grammar.
validationRules: Technical content wraps or scrolls intentionally
